note: Machine-readable companion to docs/pqc-progression.md. Append-only dated snapshots of the LIVE posture (sksecurity pqc-snapshot). The .md is the narrative; this is the data.

snapshots.label: PRE-PQC BASELINE (Q0 — crypto-agility scaffolding, no migration)
Q2 group-key → hybrid epoch-ratchet AVAILABLE (per-group / opt-in)
snapshots.note: Hybrid ratchet live per-group (kem_suite==x25519-mlkem768); default surface stays classical until groups migrate.

snapshots.label: Q3 DM/envelope → hybrid KEM AVAILABLE (per-conversation / negotiated)
snapshots.note: pqdm.py shared sealing primitive; hybrid engages only when both peers advertise a prekey; downgrade-locked via AAD.

snapshots.label: Q4 at-rest → hybrid key-wrap AVAILABLE + fingerprint-keying bug FIXED
snapshots.note: Random DEK sealed X25519+ML-KEM-768; legacy fingerprint-derived DEK retired; Phase-1 HNDL surfaces all have a hybrid path.

snapshots.label: Q5 app-side hybrid PQC LIVE — DMs go hybrid in the BROWSER
snapshots.note: Flutter PqDmCodec + noble web ML-KEM-768; app↔Lumina DMs negotiate hybrid in-page; interop gate passed both directions.

snapshots.label: Confidentiality CUT-OVER — hybrid is the DEFAULT for new objects
snapshots.note: New groups/DMs/stores default hybrid; live migration: 4/422 groups hybrid (418 classical — members need prekeys); at-rest store hybrid. identity/sig stay classical (Phase 2).

snapshots.phase: Confidentiality cut-over — hybrid is the DEFAULT for new objects; existing objects migrated where keys are present
snapshots.label: df239fe1 verification snapshot
Q7 signatures → hybrid Ed25519+ML-DSA-65 AVAILABLE (opt-in/negotiated)
snapshots.note: skcomms.pqsig (FIPS 204 ML-DSA-65 + RFC 8032 Ed25519 composite, both legs required) wired opt-in into SignedEnvelope.sig_suite (HybridEnvelopeSigner) + capauth.pqc_identity challenge (respond/verify_challenge_hybrid). Either-or verify; classical ed25519-v1 stays default for old peers (byte-for-byte unchanged). ML-DSA signer key is per-signer, SEPARATE from the PGP root. ROOT PGP identity key still CLASSICAL — Sequoia migration gated/separate.

summary.note: signatures hybrid-pq AVAILABLE opt-in; default + root identity remain classical

snapshots.phase: Phase 2 / Q6 — Sequoia PQC signing backend (root-issuance capability, NOT a migration)
snapshots.label: Sequoia PQC signing BACKEND available — capauth can now issue an ML-DSA-87+Ed448 root (sq)
snapshots.note: Built sq 1.4.0-pqc.1 (sequoia-openpgp 2.2.0-pqc.1) against OpenSSL 3.6.2 native ML-KEM/ML-DSA/SLH-DSA; verified generate->sign->verify. GnuPG disqualified (PQC encryption-only, cannot sign with ML-DSA/SLH-DSA). capauth SequoiaBackend wired (capauth main 34dbcf0): crypto/sequoia_backend.py + Algorithm.HYBRID_ED448_MLDSA87 (suite mldsa87-ed448-v2) + CryptoBackendType.SEQUOIA + 4 TDD tests. Strongest issuable root = ML-DSA-87+Ed448 (FIPS 204, NIST L5) primary + ML-KEM-1024+X448 (FIPS 203, L5) subkey on OpenPGP v6/RFC 9580 (64-hex fps). BACKEND CAPABILITY ONLY: LIVE root PGP identity is STILL CLASSICAL ed25519-v1 — root-key rotation ceremony with Chef's real key (02BC0EB3CAD31DB691A753C70C5629AB893F9746) remains gated. Issuing against draft-ietf-openpgp-pqc-17 (Standards Track, RFC Editor queue, NOT yet an RFC; codepoint 31 ML-DSA-87+Ed448, 36 ML-KEM-1024+X448). Open item: sq sign has no --password flag (keystore path for protected-key signing).

summary.note: PQC signing backend available; LIVE root identity remains CLASSICAL until the gated rotation ceremony

snapshots.phase: Phase 2 / Q6 — PQC root identity backend proven end-to-end (capauth)
snapshots.label: PQC root works end-to-end through capauth (backend + v6 fingerprint reconciliation + ceremony validated) — live root still classical
snapshots.note: Sequoia backend extended (protected-key signing + add_pqc_subkeys, reversible). capauth broadened ~36 sites to accept v6 64-hex fingerprints (resolver/service/OIDC/authentik+migration/Nextcloud-PHP/JS) — additive, 40-hex unchanged. PQC root proven end-to-end through capauth: sovereign profile create + challenge sign/verify (incl. protected key); DID generation made honest for PQC (no false kty:RSA). Rotation+cross-sign ceremony validated on THROWAWAY keys (scripts/pqc_ceremony_dryrun.py, sq pki vouch add). LIVE root (02BC0EB3...9746) STILL CLASSICAL + v4 — rotation ceremony gated on Chef; PHP/JS/DB-migration not deployed. Pre-RFC draft-ietf-openpgp-pqc-17.
